name.ja: ロイヤルデモンズ・エクストリーム

requirement.en: During the turn you Normal Summoned this card by Tributing a Level 5 or higher monster, send the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Choose 1 monster on your opponent's field. This turn, if you would Tribute Summon a LIGHT Attribute Fiend Type monster in Attack Position, you can Tribute that opponent's monster instead of 1 monster on your field. This turn, you can only attack with Fiend Type monsters.
